macro.title: Dow Falls at the Open as Oil Prices Spike on Iran Fears - Barron's
macro.summary: The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq futures are falling the stock market considers the latest military strikes between the U.S. and Iran and an oil-price spike.

macro.summary: Have airlines joined the Mile Lie Club?

IBM shares surge 15% after Trump video resurfaces - Yahoo Finance

macro.title: A cancer vaccine made just for you. mRNA is back and it's fighting melanoma - NPR
macro.summary: A study finds that an mRNA vaccine is highly effective at preventing recurrence of this dangerous skin cancer, when used in combination with Keytruda, an immunotherapy drug.
